race.comment: READY FOR LIFT OFF (14) finished 5.5 lengths adrift in sixth last time at Narromine after being in contention on the turn in a disappointing performance. Has the class to take this out. PATTERA (3) finished twelfth over 1200m at Dubbo last time out following a determined win two runs back. Should be prominent from the outset. Expecting a bold showing. COOL SPACE (5) is experiencing a long win drought, extended last start when fourth over 1200m at Bathurst. Has the class to bounce back. HELL OF A SHOW (2) returned from a spell three weeks ago when he finished fifth over 1010m at Moruya. Strips fitter and should be thereabouts.
